title: Quotinator Changelog
description: Source of truth for all changelog content. The generation script (scripts/changelog.csx) produces CHANGELOG.md and addon/CHANGELOG.md from this file. Never edit the markdown files directly.

unreleased.description: Changes not yet in a release, following the Keep a Changelog [Unreleased] convention. Rendered as ## [Unreleased] at the top of keepachangelog format output. Omitted from ha-addon format — HA Store shows only released versions.

issues.description: GitHub issue numbers this unreleased work addresses. Must be set manually — issue numbers are ambiguous in prose and cannot be auto-detected.

cves.description: CVE IDs this unreleased work addresses (e.g. 'CVE-2025-6965').

highlights.description: User-facing plain-language summary of unreleased changes.

added.description: New features added but not yet released.

changed.description: Changes to existing behaviour not yet released.

removed.description: Removed features or behaviour not yet released.

sourceLanguage.description: ISO 639-1 code of the language used in top-level content arrays (highlights, added, etc.). Defaults to 'en' when absent. The generator falls back to this language when a requested translation is missing.

sectionHeaders.description: Localised display names for the five changelog sections, keyed by ISO 639-1 language code. Optional — when absent the generator uses built-in English strings. Individual language blocks and section keys are also optional; missing entries fall back to the sourceLanguage block, then to built-in English.

releases.description: Ordered list of releases, newest first.

sectionHeadersEntry.description: Display names for all five sections in one language. All keys are optional.

machineTranslated.description: Whether this item was machine-generated. When absent the generator's --machine-translated parameter applies (default: true). Set to false when a native speaker has verified the translation.

release.description: Recommended property order: version, date, issues, cves, highlights, audienceHighlights, added, changed, fixed, removed, translations. JSON Schema cannot enforce ordering; generators must apply it explicitly.

version.description: Semver string, including optional pre-release suffix (e.g. '1.0.0-beta.1').

highlights.description: User-facing plain-language summary in the source language. Each item is one sentence. No CVE IDs, API paths, class names, or technical terms. Omit or leave empty for internal-only releases.

added.description: Technical description of new features added in this release. Developer-facing; not shown in the Blazor UI highlights.

changed.description: Technical description of changes to existing behaviour.

removed.description: Technical description of removed features or behaviour.

audienceHighlights.description: Audience-specific highlight overrides keyed by audience identifier (e.g. 'ha-addon'). When a key is present and non-empty, the generator uses those items for that audience instead of the standard highlights. When present but empty ([]), the generator emits 'No user-facing changes.' When the key is absent, the standard highlights are used as fallback.

issues.description: GitHub issue numbers addressed by this release.

cves.description: CVE IDs addressed by this release (e.g. 'CVE-2025-6965').

translations.description: Translations of release content keyed by ISO 639-1 language code. All sections and items are optional. Items that omit machineTranslated inherit the generator's --machine-translated default.
